content:
## Agent as Pure Function

The agent should not traverse the behaviour tree itself — reasoning about what to do is where agents go wrong. The traversal is deterministic: a script runs before the agent and evaluates the tree mechanically. The agent gets handed a specific task and executes it as a pure function. Same principle as the shoe-makers project. [[source:811302f6-0be7-435c-b844-910cc9a21b67/18]]

provenance.raw_agent: It shouldn't traverse the tree itself — reasoning about what to do is where agents go wrong. The traversal should be deterministic. The agent gets handed a specific task and executes it as a pure function.
provenance.raw_user: I think we should build some of the ground work for running the behaviour tree as a dry run. How do we envisage that working? ... Which parts can be made deterministic? How does an agent know what to do in its traversal of the tree?
